summary: Phase 7 (LeadNation Brain) end-to-end testing. Backend: 38/38 pytest pass — refactor introduced ZERO regressions, all 14 prior GET endpoints + 5 POST tools + admin auth still work after server.py split. New Brain APIs (/api/brain/ask, /search, /engines, /status, /context, /conversation, /save) all healthy. Admin Brain (/api/admin/brain/overview, /knowledge/reseed) token-gated and returning rich analytics. Frontend: /brain renders hero, 12 engine badges, suggested prompts. Clicking brain-suggest-0 ('Can I export Agarbatti to UAE?') produces an assistant reply with all 6 expected engine pills (product_intelligence, country_context, compliance, tariff, trade_news, logistics) and 4 source cards (UAE country, Compliance Services, Duty Calculator, Trade News). /ai-assistant correctly redirects to /brain. Top-nav shows 'LeadNation Brain' (nav-link-leadnation-brain). Admin login -> admin-tab-brain -> /admin/brain renders engine health (12 engines), KB status (61 entries, 9 kinds), most-asked questions, top countries/products, and a working Reseed button.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: server.py is now a 56-line entrypoint that just wires domain routers + brain package + startup seeding. Major improvement over the previous 1725-line monolith.

GOOD: Brain router cleanly separates orchestrate (router.py), engines (engines.py), knowledge base (knowledge.py), memory (memory.py), provider abstraction (providers.py), search layers (search_layer.py). Easy to plug a live LLM later by setting BRAIN_AI_PROVIDER env.

OBSERVATION: brain/router.py orchestrate() does sequential awaits per engine in a for-loop (up to 6 engines). For perf, consider asyncio.gather to run engines concurrently — current latency is acceptable because engines hit local KB only.

OBSERVATION: extract_entities uses substring matching which can false-positive (e.g. 'Iran' would match 'IRAN' in 'IRANIAN'). The current word lists are small so risk is low, but consider word-boundary regex for production.

OBSERVATION: Phase 4 (iteration_4) regression — Home page Globe error ('globeMaterial is not a function') and /api/global-search 'countrie'/'industrie' rstrip bug — were NOT explicitly retested this iteration; they were not part of Phase 7 scope and remain open unless fixed since iteration_4.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Phase 7 UI flows pass: /brain hero+12 badges+suggest click renders engines & sources, redirect /ai-assistant -> /brain, admin-tab-brain -> /admin/brain shows engine health/KB/top questions/top countries/top products, reseed button works)

seed_data_creation: Test queries logged in brain_queries collection (Can I export Agarbatti to UAE?, Which HSN code for Basmati rice?, How do I get IEC registration?, What is the duty on textiles to Australia?). brain_usage entries also created. user_context tu and saved item 'UAE'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 fully green at /app/backend/tests/test_phase7_brain.py (38 tests). Brain page IDs: brain-engine-badges, brain-suggest-0..5, brain-input, brain-send, brain-thread, brain-msg-{i}, brain-engines-{i}, brain-sources-{i}. NOTE: brain-msg-0 is the welcome assistant; first user click goes to brain-msg-1; first assistant reply with engines/sources is brain-msg-2 -> brain-engines-2, brain-sources-2 (not -1). Admin Brain IDs: brain-engine-health, brain-kb-status, brain-top-questions, brain-top-countries, brain-reseed-btn, admin-tab-brain. Carry forward from iter_4: HOME GLOBE ERROR and /api/global-search 'countrie'/'industrie' rstrip bug remain open if not yet fixed.
